info.title: PocketBase API
info.description: API documentation generated from PocketBase schema with collection grouping

get.summary: GIS API: list a project's GeoJSON layers
get.description: SvelteKit app route (NOT a PocketBase `/collections/*` route). Returns a layer index for the project: one entry per workflow plus a markers layer, each with a feature count and a ready-to-paste `.geojson` URL for GIS clients such as QGIS. Authenticated with a GIS bearer token (`gisBearer`).

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: PocketBase id of the project.

id.description: Workflow id for workflow layers; null for the markers layer.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired API token.

403.description: Token is scoped to a different project.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the token's owning admin).

get.summary: GIS API: project markers as GeoJSON
get.description: SvelteKit app route (NOT a PocketBase `/collections/*` route). Returns the project's markers as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of Point features (WGS84, `[lon, lat]`). Markers without a valid location are skipped. Authenticated with a GIS bearer token (`gisBearer`).

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: PocketBase id of the project.

properties.description: Marker attributes. Fixed keys `id`, `title`, `description`, `category` (resolved to the category name), `created`, `created_by`, plus the flattened entries of the marker's `properties` JSON (objects are JSON-stringified; keys colliding with the fixed ones are skipped).

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired API token.

403.description: Token is scoped to a different project.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the token's owning admin).

get.summary: GIS API: workflow instances as GeoJSON
get.description: SvelteKit app route (NOT a PocketBase `/collections/*` route). Returns a workflow's instances as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection (WGS84, RFC 7946). Geometry is emitted verbatim from `workflow_instances.geometry`; Point workflows whose geometry is null fall back to the derived centroid. Authenticated with a GIS bearer token (`gisBearer`).

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: PocketBase id of the project.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: PocketBase id of the workflow. Must belong to `projectId`, otherwise 404.

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry copied verbatim from the instance (any GeoJSON type, WGS84 `[lon, lat]`). For Point workflows with no stored geometry, the derived centroid Point is used; otherwise null when absent.

properties.description: Instance attributes. System fields `id`, `status`, `current_stage` (resolved stage name), `created_by` (resolved participant name), `created`, `last_activity_at`, plus one property per `workflow_field_defs` entry keyed by its label (collisions disambiguated). Relation/selector ids are resolved to labels; array values are joined with "; "; file fields list their file names joined with "; ".

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired API token.

403.description: Token is scoped to a different project.

404.description: Project or workflow not found, or the workflow does not belong to the project.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relations to expand. Use dot notation for nested relations.

x-notes.description:
### Expansion Options

This endpoint supports expanding relations. Use the `expand` parameter with any of the following paths:

- `project_id`
- `project_id.owner_id`
- `role_id`
- `role_id.project_id`
- `role_id.project_id.owner_id`

You can also combine multiple expansions with commas (e.g., `expand=field1,field2.nested`).

api_tokensRecord.description: An admin-issued, read-only personal access token for the GIS API. The raw token is shown once in the SECTOR UI when minted and is never stored or returned by the API; only its sha256 hash (`token_hash`) and the last four characters (`last_four`) are persisted.

user_id.description: Relation field (users). The admin who owns the token; data reads run impersonating this user, so PocketBase access rules scope what the token can see. When expanded, this becomes the related record object.

project_id.description: Relation field (projects). Optional project scope. When set, the token may only access this project; requests for any other project return 403. When expanded, this becomes the related record object.

label.description: Human-readable label for the token (shown in the SECTOR token list).

token_hash.description: sha256 hex hash of the raw token. The raw token is never stored or returned by the API; lookups hash the presented Bearer token and match it against this value.

last_four.description: Last four characters of the raw token, kept only to help the admin recognise a token in the SECTOR list.

expires_at.description: Expiry timestamp. A token whose `expires_at` is in the past is rejected with 401.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful use (throttled best-effort update).

revoked.description: When true, the token is rejected with 401 regardless of expiry.

gisBearer.description: Read-only personal access token for the GIS API (SECTOR-minted, raw form `ubk_<base64url>`). Present it as `Authorization: Bearer ubk_...`. The raw token is shown to the admin once in the SECTOR UI and is never stored or returned by the API — only its sha256 hash lives in the `api_tokens` collection. Distinct from `bearerAuth`, which is a PocketBase JWT for the `/collections/*` routes.

tags.name: GIS API
tags.description: Read-only GeoJSON export endpoints for external GIS clients (QGIS). SvelteKit app routes under /api/geo, authenticated with a SECTOR-minted bearer token.
